name: Sequential_Bounded_Queues

documentation.description:
See the "Controlling Runtime Checks" section of README.md regarding whether
to disable preconditions. In general you should not disable precondition
checks at runtime (if present).

simple_types.name: Queue
simple_types.code:
type Queue (Capacity : Positive_Element_Count) is limited private with
  Default_Initial_Condition => Empty (Queue),
  Iterable => (First       => First_Iter_Index,
               Next        => Next_Iter_Index,
               Has_Element => Iter_Has_Element,
               Element     => Iter_Value);

array_types.name: Queue_Model

subtypes.name: Element_Count
subtypes.code: subtype Element_Count is Base_Integer range 0 .. Base_Integer'Last - 1;

subtypes.name: Positive_Element_Count
subtypes.code: subtype Positive_Element_Count is Element_Count range 1 .. Element_Count'Last;

documentation.description:
A replacement for predefined equality, this routine only compares the
parts of Left and Right that are logically contained.

subprograms.name: Copy
subprograms.code: procedure Copy (Source : Queue; Target : in out Queue)

documentation.description:
A replacement for assignment, this routine only copies to Target that
part of Source which is logically contained at the time of the call.

subprograms.name: Delete
subprograms.code: procedure Delete (This : in out Queue;  Number_To_Delete : Positive_Element_Count)

documentation.description:
Deletes the requested number of elements from This, starting with the
oldest. At most the current number of contained elements are deleted.

parameters.name: This
parameters.description:
the remaining content is unchanged

the next oldest element out is...

parameters.name: Number_To_Delete
parameters.description:
the remaining content is unchanged

the next oldest element out is...

documentation.description: Returns the number of elements currently contained in This

subprograms.name: Insert
subprograms.code: procedure Insert (This : in out Queue; Item : Element)

documentation.description:
Inserts Item, overwriting the oldest contained element if This was
already Full when the routine was called.

parameters.name: This
parameters.description:
Item was appended

Item overwrote the oldest entry; old front (the oldest)
is dropped and Item is appended as the new newest.

parameters.name: Item
parameters.description:
Item was appended

Item overwrote the oldest entry; old front (the oldest)
is dropped and Item is appended as the new newest.

subprograms.name: Insert_Preserving
subprograms.code: procedure Insert_Preserving (This : in out Queue; Item : Element)

documentation.description:
Inserts Item only if This buffer is not already full, therefore never
overwrites data.

subprograms.name: Iter_Has_Element
subprograms.code: function Iter_Has_Element (This : Queue;  Position : Positive_Element_Count) return Boolean

subprograms.name: Iter_Value
subprograms.code: function Iter_Value (This : Queue; Position : Positive_Element_Count) return Element

documentation.description: Returns the current logical contents of This, ordered oldest to newest.

Returns the value that would be removed by a subsequent call to Get, or
deleted via Delete, or overwritten via Put when This is full. The value
is the oldest currently contained. This function allows clients to query
the value without having to remove it.

subprograms.name: Next_Iter_Index
subprograms.code: function Next_Iter_Index (Unused : Queue; Position : Positive_Element_Count) return Positive_Element_Count

subprograms.name: Remove
subprograms.code: procedure Remove (This : in out Queue; Item : out Element)

documentation.description: Gets the next Item from This, oldest first.

parameters.name: This
parameters.description:
The rest of This is unchanged. The model is always ordered
oldest to newest, and Get removes the oldest first.

parameters.name: Item
parameters.description:
The rest of This is unchanged. The model is always ordered
oldest to newest, and Get removes the oldest first.

documentation.description:
The underlying integer type used for counting contained elements and
specifying physical capacities for Queue objects.
The type of values contained by objects of type Queue.
